display.purpose: Page-level titles. Light weight (300) is intentional at 32px.

body.purpose: Table cells, body copy, form field values. Roboto for data legibility.

label.purpose: Buttons, column headers, status chips, nav items.

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Card default. The system's most-used shadow; barely visible.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Slide-in side panels (StatusPanel, DeclinePanel, column picker).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Tab indicator and layout transitions. Expo-out feel.

motion.name: ease-color
motion.purpose: Background color and border-color state transitions.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Framer Motion section reveals and panel slides.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The system's primary action trigger. Compact, uppercase, teal.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="margin-right:4px"><path d="M19 13H13V19H11V13H5V11H11V5H13V11H19V13Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>ADD THIRD PARTY</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: #028FBB; color: #F4F4F4; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #017295; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #02A3D5; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions. Same dimensions as primary; transparent background.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: #028FBB; border: 1px solid #028FBB; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #E8F9FE; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #02A3D5; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. 32px height matches button baseline.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #0C2A31; letter-spacing: 0.1px; } .ds-input { height: 32px; border: 1px solid #C4CCD2; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 10px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Roboto', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; color: #0C2A31; background: #FFFFFF; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5A6E73; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #028FBB; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(2, 163, 213, 0.12); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #F4F4F4; color: #5A6E73; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Status Chip: Approved
components.description: Semantic status badge for approved third parties.
components.html: Approved
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-approved { background: #AAF3D2; color: #07502E; } .ds-chip-pending { background: #DFE3E7; color: #0C2A31; } .ds-chip-declined { background: #F5BFC1; color: #9A3438; } .ds-chip-warning { background: #FAE8BB; color: #564518; }

components.name: Status Chip: Declined
components.description: Semantic status badge for declined or not-approved third parties.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-declined { background: #F5BFC1; color: #9A3438; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Classification tag used in the third-party table and profile fields.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 2px; background: #DFE3E7; color: #0C2A31; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Standard bordered table with alternating row stripes. The system's primary data display pattern.
components.html:
Third Party NameRisk LevelStatusOwner
Pied PiperHighApprovedJ. Smith
Initech CorpMediumPendingA. Lee
Lumon IndustriesLowDeclinedR. Park
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: 'Roboto', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; } .ds-table thead th { background: #F4F4F4; border: 1px solid #DFE3E7; border-bottom: 1px solid #D6DBE0; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #516267; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-table tbody tr:nth-child(odd) { background: #E8F9FE; } .ds-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: #FFFFFF; } .ds-table tbody tr { transition: background 100ms ease; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: #F0F7FA; } .ds-table tbody td { padding: 10px 12px; vertical-align: middle; color: #516267; border: 1px solid #DFE3E7; } .ds-cell-link { color: #0289B3; font-weight: 500; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-approved { background: #AAF3D2; color: #07502E; } .ds-chip-pending { background: #DFE3E7; color: #0C2A31; } .ds-chip-declined { background: #F5BFC1; color: #9A3438; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content card with top accent bar. Used for primary page sections.
components.html:
Third Party Details
Field content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); border-top: 4px solid #028FBB; } .ds-card-header { padding: 16px; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: #0C2A31; border-bottom: 1px solid #DFE3E7; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; font-family: 'Roboto', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #516267; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Left sidebar navigation item used in Settings and CompanyAdmin.
components.html: Currency & Approval GroupsRenewalsStages
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 226px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 8px 0; } .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'Simplon Norm', 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #516267; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #E8F9FE; color: #0C2A31; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: #028FBB; color: #FFFFFF; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-item-active:hover { background: #017295; color: #FFFFFF; }

narrative.overview:
This design system is a professional's tool, built for people who spend long sessions making consequential decisions. The aesthetic draws from the mental model of a well-kept case file: everything is findable, nothing is decorative, and the system earns trust through its consistency. A compliance officer opening a third-party profile should feel a quiet sense of order, not the manufactured urgency that plagues financial dashboards or the visual chaos of legacy GRC tools.

The palette is anchored by Riskcenter Teal, a considered blue-green that conveys both institutional reliability and calm focus without sliding into the navy-and-gray gravity well of enterprise software. Surfaces are a warm Paper Gray, not a harsh white. Text is a deep teal-tinted ink that ties every element back to the brand hue without announcing itself. The overall effect: a room that was arranged for you before you arrived.

Information density is treated with respect. Long sessions mean complex screens. The system allows tables with many columns, forms with many fields, and panels with layered information. Density is achieved through precise spacing and tight components, not compression. The difference between a cramped screen and a dense one is rhythm, and rhythm comes from varied spacing that the eye can parse without effort.
keyCharacteristics: Teal-anchored ink and accent system; the brand color appears in structural roles (nav, buttons, links) and nowhere else
Two-typeface hierarchy: Simplon Norm for UI chrome and headings, Roboto for data-heavy body text
32px component baseline: buttons, inputs, select controls all share the same height
Flat-by-default elevation; card borders and shadow-xs separate surfaces without drama
Status communicated through tinted surface + high-contrast text pairs; color is never the only carrier of meaning

rules.name: The Structural Only Rule
rules.body: Riskcenter Teal appears exclusively in structural roles: navigation, primary actions, links, focus indicators, and active states. It is never used as a decorative splash or gradient. Its rarity ensures it always carries meaning.

rules.name: The Paired Status Rule
rules.body: Every status color is paired: a desaturated surface tint plus a high-contrast text color. The surface alone communicates nothing; the pair communicates everything. Never use the surface tint as the only status indicator.

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: Simplon Norm is for the interface; Roboto is for the data. Do not use Simplon Norm for body text in tables or Roboto for button labels.

rules.name: The Light Display Rule
rules.body: 32px headings use weight 300. The lightness is intentional at large sizes. Do not bump the weight to 500 for impact.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards are flat at rest. A card gains a shadow only when it moves (hover, drag) or floats above other content (dropdown, panel). Static card grids with identical elevation on every tile are prohibited.

dos: Do use Riskcenter Teal exclusively for structural roles: nav, primary buttons, links, focus rings, active indicators, checkbox fill.
Do pair every status color: surface tint + high-contrast text. Both elements must be present.
Do match button, input, and select heights to 32px.
Do use border-top: 4px solid var(--primary-500) on cards that anchor primary page sections.
Do animate tab indicators with Framer Motion layoutId, not CSS ::after pseudo-elements.
Do keep body text containers below 65–75ch.
Do make color + icon + text carry every status together. Color alone fails WCAG AA.
Do use Simplon Norm for UI chrome and Roboto for data.
donts: Don't make this look like ServiceNow or legacy GRC tools: no heavy gray grids, no overwhelming chrome, no dated form UI.
Don't use dark mode with neon or high-chroma accents. Compliance is not a trading terminal.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient background).
Don't build identical card grids: same-sized cards, same icon + heading + text repeated.
Don't use a modal as the first solution for progressive disclosure.
Don't use Riskcenter Teal decoratively as a colored section background or gradient.
Don't render a status chip with only a background tint and no accompanying text color from the paired set.
Don't use weight 500 on 32px display headings.
